item.title:
AI should have been named IA.
Millions more people would have embraced it to boost their everyday p...
item.description:
AI should have been named IA.
Millions more people would have embraced it to boost their everyday performance.
It's something I discuss in my new @MasterClass https://t.co/KdoC2f52VU
--- @erikbryn | ❤️ 8 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 643
item.author: @erikbryn
